author: hollowstrawberry
description: Lets all cogs work normally even if "bot is typing..." breaks on Discord's end. This has happened at least 3 times in 2026, which led to this cog's creation. This cog exists because, from a design perspective, a malfunctioning visual indicator should not stop command execution, particularly in core commands like [p]cog update. Ironically, if you're currently experiencing an outage that would need this cog, you'll need to use an eval, as cog install depends on the typing indicator.
install_msg:
🔗 __**TypingFix**__
```Cog installed. Instructions:
1. Load it with [p]load typingfix
2. All set. In the rare case that "bot is typing..." breaks on Discord's end, all cogs will continue working normally.```
short: Lets all cogs work normally even if "bot is typing..." breaks on Discord's end.
end_user_data_statement: This cog does not store user data.
